# Languages & Scripting

| Language | Level | Status |
|----------|-------|--------|
| Python | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| Groovy | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| Shell/Bash | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| C++ | Intermediate | ⬜ Pending |
| PHP | Intermediate | ⬜ Pending |
| Windows Batch | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Python: CI/CD tooling, test automation, RAG pipelines, API integrations
- Groovy: Jenkins Shared Libraries, pipeline DSL, build scripting
- Shell/Bash: Build orchestration, environment setup, automation scripts
- C++: Build system understanding (CMake, Soong), embedded firmware context
- Windows Batch: Windows build environment automation
